_about: Synthetic held-out MCQ bank for the public evaluation demo. Held out by construction: never placed in the corpus, never fed to any candidate. Used to exercise the seen-vs-held report and the copy-in leakage check. Standard physics facts, written from scratch, no third-party text.

items.stem: Two carts collide and stick together on a frictionless track. Which quantity is necessarily conserved through the collision?
choices: The mechanical energy of the heavier cart

items.stem: A charged particle moves parallel to a uniform magnetic field. What magnetic force does it feel?
choices: A force that grows with speed

items.stem: In the Bohr model of hydrogen, how does the electron orbital radius scale with the principal quantum number n?
For any spontaneous irreversible process in an isolated system, what happens to the total entropy?
